mapper.select: SELECT metric_value FROM STATISTICS_VIEW WHERE dimension_type = 'GLOBAL' AND metric_name = #{metricName} LIMIT 1
SELECT stat_id, dimension_type, dimension_id, metric_name, metric_value, update_date FROM STATISTICS_VIEW WHERE dimension_type = 'GLOBAL' ORDER BY stat_id
SELECT stat_id, dimension_type, dimension_id, metric_name, metric_value, update_date FROM STATISTICS_VIEW WHERE dimension_type = 'DEPARTMENT' AND dimension_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY stat_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STATISTICS_VIEW (dimension_type, dimension_id, metric_name, metric_value, update_date) VALUES (#{dimensionType}, #{dimensionId}, #{metricName}, #{metricValue}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE metric_value = #{metricValue}, update_date = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT CASE title WHEN '1' THEN '教授' WHEN '2' THEN '副教授' WHEN '3' THEN '讲师' WHEN '4' THEN '助理教授' WHEN '5' THEN '研究员' ELSE COALESCE(title, '其他') END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM FACULTY WHERE title IS NOT NULL GROUP BY title ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT status as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM STUDENT WHERE status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT YEAR(publication_date) as year, COUNT(*) as value FROM ACADEMIC_PAPER WHERE publication_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY YEAR(publication_date) ORDER BY year
SELECT YEAR(allocation_date) as year, SUM(amount) as value FROM FUNDING_RECORD WHERE allocation_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY YEAR(allocation_date) ORDER BY year

SELECT d.department_name as departmentName, COUNT(DISTINCT f.faculty_id) as facultyCount, COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) as studentCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.paper_id) as paperCount, COUNT(DISTINCT pat.patent_id) as patentCount, COUNT(DISTINCT rp.project_id) as projectCount FROM DEPARTMENT d LEFT JOIN FACULTY f ON d.department_id = f.department_id LEFT JOIN STUDENT s ON d.department_id = s.department_id LEFT JOIN ACADEMIC_PAPER ap ON d.department_id = ap.department_id LEFT JOIN PATENT pat ON d.department_id = pat.department_id LEFT JOIN RESEARCH_PROJECT rp ON d.department_id = rp.department_id GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name ORDER BY d.department_id
SELECT project_level as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM RESEARCH_PROJECT WHERE project_level IS NOT NULL GROUP BY project_level ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT patent_type as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM PATENT WHERE patent_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY patent_type ORDER BY value DESC
